message:
test(gui): add unit tests for GlyphCache color, line sprite, and block caching

The GlyphCache had no unit tests despite complex caching behavior for
colors, line sprites, and block glyphs. Adds 5 tests:

- cached_color_reuses_sprite_for_identical_rgba: verifies cache hit for
  same (r,g,b,alpha) produces identical coords and texture pointer
- cached_color_distinguishes_alpha_variants: verifies different alpha
  values for the same RGB color produce separate cache entries
- cached_line_sprite_promotes_hyperlink_without_underline_to_single:
  verifies hyperlink=true with Underline::None maps to the same sprite
  as plain Underline::Single (the hyperlink promotion logic)
- cached_line_sprite_promotes_hyperlink_single_to_double: verifies
  hyperlink=true with Underline::Single maps to Underline::Double
- cached_block_reuses_sprite_for_same_shape_and_metrics: verifies
  BlockKey::CellDiagonals cache reuse for identical shape+metrics

All tests use in-memory atlas via GlyphCache::new_in_memory to avoid
GPU dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
